name: 03_01_bb_rsi_mean_reversion_xauusd_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when price closes outside Bollinger Bands with an extreme RSI(7) reading during active sessions and in sufficiently volatile regimes, price reverts toward the mean within 30 bars, producing a positive expectancy after 1.5xATR stops.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi(7) < 12 AND bb_width_percentile(200) > 30 AND session_mask==1
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi(7) > 88 AND bb_width_percentile(200) > 30 AND session_mask==1

regime_filter.rule: atr_percentile between 25 and 90 (avoid dead and panic regimes)

exit_rules.take_profit: opposite Bollinger Band (middle-to-upper mean reversion target)
exit_rules.breakeven: move SL to entry after price reaches 1.0*ATR in favor

notes: Inspired by BB-RSI scalper cards (inspiration_only). Ported conceptually to gold M15.
